problem-pick: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another LLM will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other LLM will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
problem-guess: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another LLM will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other LLM will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Try to guess the other LLM's number. Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
problem-coordinate: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Another LLM will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other LLM will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Try to coordinate like a team. Choosing an option that is entirely different from the others is highly recommended (for example, in a different category). Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
